---
title: "'What's up with ur emotions?' Untangling emotional user experience on Second Life and Facebook"
author: "Photiadis, Th., and Papa, V."
date: 2022-01-01
description: "Behaviour & Information Technology, 1–14. doi: 10.1080/0144929X.2021.2013537"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
